title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
